programs.title: Welcome to Plathville
programs.desc: Ethan returns to Cairo for Thanksgiving before officially moving to Wisconsin to be closer to his ex-girlfriend, Teegan; Kim makes a surprising admission to the family, Barry hunts for Bigfoot, and Zac inserts himself into Ethan's situationship.

programs.title: Unexpected
programs.sub_title: Giving Birth Was Supposed to Be a Happy Thing
programs.desc: Jenna's mom worries about the relationship with Aden, prompting Jenna to talk to Aden; Lilly and Lawrence tour a wedding venue; Tiarra arrives in Kentucky for Ella's birthday; Emersyn settles into Mason's house.

programs.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programs.sub_title: Extra Love: He's Low-Key Chopping Down a Tree
programs.desc: With bonus scenes; Jonah and Alex help Brice get over his fear of public speaking; Trent cuts down a tree in the backyard, but concerns rise as he begins having heart palpitations; the family experiences a devastating loss.

programs.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programs.sub_title: The Rain Is Giving Me the Ick
programs.desc: It's the week leading up to Elizabeth and Brice's wedding and there's lots to do to get ready; Liz's dress is back from getting alterations, but she worries it's still not right; the rainstorm puts everything at the perfect wedding venue in jeopardy.
